qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider the C program below #include <stdio.h> int *A, stkTop; int stkFunc (int opcode, int val) { static int size=0, stkTop=0; switch (opcode) { case -1: size = val; break; case 0: if (stkTop < size ) A[stkTop++]=val; break; default: if (stkTop) return A[--stkTop]; }
